simplePages.title: about
simplePages.text:
I've primarily worked as a Director, as well as an Editor and a Rollerblading Camera Operator.

I love to explore the parts of life that seem to escape words. That's why I make strange films sometimes. Take a look at my work and feel free to reach out to me via any of the methods on my contact page.

contactPage.intro: I look forward to hearing from you

projects.title: ZEPHYR
projects.about:
This film means everything to me. My first time directing, and the project I loved the most from start to finish. It was a collaboration with my closest friend Finn, and an opportunity to do something completely honest and from the heart. 

Whilst we were describing it to people long before it was made, I would say sensation over sense, palpability over plausibility, and I've been blown away by how people responded to it. It didn't land well with most people, but that was always expected. 

If you ever want to step into a strange reflective world of sound and light, then please indulge.

projects.title: BAYE FALL
projects.about:
This is an ongoing project, this short video is our initial teaser. 

It's a documentation of one night of working for the fishermen in Kafountine, Casamance, Senegal. I'm working on it with a close friend Spike Adams - we are currently in the process of figuring out which way feels right to continue sharing this story, and which of the many faces of the story we want to share. 

The core of it for me is the fisherman and their songs, their work, their faith, their boldness and love in the face of real hard work and the mounting pressures from globalisation and exploitation from other nations around the world.
projects.credits:
Filmed by me
Edited by me and Spike Adams
Sound design by Jasper Trim

projects.title: THE BATTLE OF CABLE STREET
projects.about:
This short documentary was made with Yis and Graeme from Novo and Unite - an anti-racist and anti-facist union in East London. 

The Battle of Cable Street is such an important moment in our history, and Yis brings it forward into relevance with clarity and grace.

projects.title: CHILDISH
projects.about:
Directing Planet Childish by TGFbros was a pleasure. 

Such an amazing team all around (especially Abbey Valentina). They gave us free reign to create something bizarre, something free, and their audience responded really well to it. 

Long live Nathan and may he return to earth some day to pick up some more Aveeno.

projects.title: AIM
projects.about:
A short commercial from the wonderful Sophia, DP'd by Max Brunner. 
I was rollerblading and operating to achieve some of the faster paced sequences in central London.

projects.about:
Alalake is a collaborative album by Jasper Trim and Mafu Conteh, alongside Musa Filly Jobarteh, Mariam Cham, Sidia Susso and many others. 

We had a chance to shoot one music video for their song Monayeh, which translates roughly to 'let's not fight'
projects.credits:
Directed and edited by Jack Tierney
Colour Grade by Myth Shah

projects.title: Bones
projects.about:
This was a music video (one of three) that I made for Finnegan Tui with the team from Murmur.

I loved to explore the trajectory of growing up and growing old, to feel where life might take us and share this exploration with the crew.
